overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a historical action game showing an armored warrior with a shield walking through a sunlit stone colonnade. The character moves steadily past wooden doors and stone pillars in an ancient temple or palace setting with warm, natural lighting filtering through arched windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone colonnade with arched windows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the colonnade, passing wooden doors and stone pillars while approaching a distant figure in blue robes

stationary figure in blue robes standing in the corridor ahead

entered.detail: large ancient wooden door with metal studs set in a weathered stone frame
tall cylindrical stone column supporting the corridor ceiling
series of repeating arched openings allowing sunlight to stream into the corridor
long corridor extending into the distance with rhythmic arches and columns
ornate ceiling with geometric patterns and faded red paint between wooden beams

segments.scene_description: The segment shows continuous forward movement through a sunlit stone colonnade in what appears to be an ancient temple or palace. The armored character walks steadily past large wooden doors and stone pillars on the left, while arched windows on the right allow warm natural light to flood the corridor. A pedestrian in simple clothing briefly passes by on the left, and a distant figure in blue robes remains stationary at the far end of the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a sunlit stone colonnade within an ancient temple or palace. It begins with the armored character walking steadily past large wooden doors and massive stone pillars that line the left side of the corridor. As the camera advances, warm natural light floods the space from a series of arched windows on the right, illuminating the path. The scene then shifts as a pedestrian in simple clothing briefly passes by on the left, before the perspective opens up to reveal a stationary figure in blue robes waiting at the far end of the hall.
